mapper.insert: insert into coupon(name, goods_id, discount_amount, threshold_amount, total_stock, available_stock, status, start_time, end_time) values (#{name}, #{goodsId}, #{discountAmount}, #{thresholdAmount}, #{totalStock}, #{availableStock}, #{status}, #{startTime}, #{endTime})
mapper.update: update coupon set available_stock = available_stock + #{delta}, update_time = current_timestamp where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select id, name, goods_id, discount_amount, threshold_amount, total_stock, available_stock, status, start_time, end_time, create_time, update_time from coupon where id = #{id} limit 1
select id, name, goods_id, discount_amount, threshold_amount, total_stock, available_stock, status, start_time, end_time, create_time, update_time from coupon order by id desc
mapper.insert: insert into coupon_claim(coupon_id, user_id, status) values (#{couponId}, #{userId}, #{status})
mapper.select: select user_id from coupon_claim where coupon_id = #{couponId} order by id asc
select id from coupon order by id asc

select id, name, goods_id, discount_amount, threshold_amount, total_stock, available_stock, status, start_time, end_time, create_time, update_time from coupon where status = 1 and (goods_id = #{goodsId} or goods_id is null) and (end_time is null or end_time > now()) order by id desc

select cc.id as claimId, c.id as id, c.name, c.goods_id, c.discount_amount, c.threshold_amount, c.total_stock, c.available_stock, c.status, c.start_time, c.end_time, c.create_time, c.update_time from coupon_claim cc inner join coupon c on c.id = cc.coupon_id where cc.user_id = #{userId} and cc.status = 0 and cc.used_order_id is null and c.status = 1 and (c.end_time is null or c.end_time > now()) order by cc.id desc
select id, coupon_id, user_id, status, used_order_id, create_time from coupon_claim where id = #{claimId} limit 1
mapper.update: update coupon_claim set status = 0, used_order_id = null where id = #{claimId} and status = 1
